bio.es: Head of Developer Experience en Temporal. Ex-Netlify, ex-AWS. Acuñó el término 'Learning in Public' y es defensor del crecimiento profesional a través de compartir conocimiento. Autor de 'The Coding Career Handbook'.
bio.en: Head of Developer Experience at Temporal. Ex-Netlify, ex-AWS. Coined the term 'Learning in Public' and advocates for professional growth through sharing knowledge. Author of 'The Coding Career Handbook'.
